statements.status_notes: Compiled into the Grype binary (rust-crate). DockGuard does not use Grype's JWT functionality; it invokes the Grype CLI for local image scanning only.
node-brace-expansion is installed as a Debian dependency of Node.js but DockGuard's SvelteKit server does not use brace expansion functionality.
node-minimatch is installed as a Debian dependency of Node.js but DockGuard's SvelteKit server does not use glob/minimatch pattern matching.
node-minimatch is installed as a Debian dependency of Node.js but DockGuard's SvelteKit server does not use glob/minimatch pattern matching.
node-minimatch is installed as a Debian dependency of Node.js but DockGuard's SvelteKit server does not use glob/minimatch pattern matching.
libldap2 is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. DockGuard does not use LDAP.

Kerberos libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard does not use Kerberos authentication.

Kerberos libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard does not use Kerberos authentication.
libgnutls30t64 is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. Python and Node.js use their own TLS stacks (OpenSSL). DockGuard does not link against GnuTLS.
systemd/udev libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard uses supervisor as its process manager, not systemd.
systemd/udev libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard uses supervisor as its process manager, not systemd.
systemd/udev libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard uses supervisor as its process manager, not systemd.
systemd/udev libraries are DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependencies. DockGuard uses supervisor as its process manager, not systemd.
tar is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. DockGuard does not perform tar operations at runtime.
perl-base is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. DockGuard does not use Perl.
apt is the Debian package manager. DockGuard does not run apt at runtime.
dpkg is the Debian package manager. DockGuard does not run dpkg at runtime.
Supervisor is used only as an internal process manager by DockGuard and is not part of DockGuard's external API surface.
Ancient/theoretical glibc CVE. Debian has classified this as not-fixed for over a decade and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Ancient/theoretical glibc CVE. Debian has classified this as not-fixed for years and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Ancient/theoretical glibc CVE. Debian has classified this as not-fixed for years and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Disputed glibc CVE about stack-clash protection. Debian has classified this as not-fixed and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Disputed glibc CVE. Debian has classified this as not-fixed and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Disputed glibc CVE about ASLR information leak. Debian has classified this as not-fixed and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
Disputed glibc CVE. Debian has classified this as not-fixed and no practical remediation is available in the current Debian package stream.
util-linux CVE about partial escaping in chfn/chsh. DockGuard does not use interactive login utilities.
util-linux is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. DockGuard does not use util-linux interactive utilities at runtime.
coreutils CVE about chown race condition. DockGuard does not use chown in TOCTOU-sensitive scenarios.
coreutils is a DHI (Docker Hardened Images) base image dependency. DockGuard does not use the affected coreutils functionality at runtime.
Negligible SQLite CVE (disputed memory leak). DockGuard uses SQLite via Python's sqlite3 module which does not trigger the affected code path.

Python 3.13 runtime vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. This statement remains marked not_affected because the affected behavior is not used by DockGuard runtime paths.
Node.js core vulnerability. Tracking Debian Node.js package updates for a fix. Affected component is the Node.js runtime used to serve the SvelteKit frontend.

glibc vulnerability in libc-bin/libc6. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. DockGuard depends on glibc indirectly through Python and Node.js.

libtasn1-6 vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. Used indirectly by GnuTLS and system crypto libraries.
libexpat1 vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. Used indirectly by Python for XML parsing.

python3-jaraco.context and python3-pkg-resources vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. These are Debian-packaged Python setuptools dependencies.
curl/libcurl vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. curl is installed in the image and available at runtime.
curl/libcurl vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. curl is installed in the image and available at runtime.

curl/libcurl vulnerability (Negligible severity). curl is installed in the image.

ncurses vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. ncurses is used by terminal applications within the container.

libsqlite3-0 vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. DockGuard uses SQLite for its database via Python's sqlite3 module.
zlib1g vulnerability. Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. zlib is used by Python and Node.js for compression.
util-linux vulnerability (Unknown severity). Current Debian advisory metadata indicates no fixed package is available in the tracked base image at this time. Investigation remains in progress.
